title: mentha pantotricha
intro: Mentha pantotricha, also known as woolly mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its woolly, hairy leaves and stems. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Mentha pantotricha include its ability to ease nausea, relieve headaches, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Mentha pantotricha can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for skin issues and joint pain.
